name: The Limestone Bay
about: The Limestone Bay is a self-serve golf simulator venue offering private bay rentals with advanced Foresight Falcon technology. The facility operates 24/7 with a focus on player development and providing an authentic golfing experience. Pricing is hourly per bay, allowing groups of up to 6 to share the cost. It is designed for both solo practice and group play, featuring a comfortable suite with amenities like seating, a mini-fridge, and TV for between-shot activities.
why_golfers_like_it: High-precision Foresight Falcon launch monitor technology for detailed shot analysis
Flexible BYOB policy allowing guests to bring their own food and alcohol
24/7 self-serve access with online booking for ultimate convenience
Spacious private suites accommodating up to 6 people comfortably

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food.
Guests are welcome to bring their own alcoholic beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead launch monitor with 1,652 sq in hitting zone and four Quadrascopic cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to play with your preferred equipment. Clean golf or gym shoes are required.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and alcoholic beverages to enjoy in the private suite.

faq.question: How much time should I book to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It depends on your pace, but we recommend 2 hours for 1-2 people to play 18 holes, or 3 hours for 2-3 people to play comfortably.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention being kid-friendly, and the content is geared toward adult golfers.
